## Meeting Purpose

[Review the new content OS, production process, and LLM tracking dashboard.](https://fathom.video/share/yYqstUyP15G-sWhkKkbTqy9g1v389w55?tab=summary&timestamp=133.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Content OS Live:** The Airtable Content OS is live with \~414 topics. Vizcom must approve 10–15 topics from the "Considering" view to start a "calibration blog" next week, which will define the final voice and tone.](https://fathom.video/share/yYqstUyP15G-sWhkKkbTqy9g1v389w55?tab=summary&timestamp=133.0)
  - [**Visuals are Critical:** Vizcom's blog requires inline visuals (infographics, images) to maintain its highly visual brand identity. Growth X will provide examples for review.](https://fathom.video/share/yYqstUyP15G-sWhkKkbTqy9g1v389w55?tab=summary&timestamp=722.0)
  - [**Scrunch Dashboard Live:** The Scrunch dashboard is tracking Vizcom's LLM visibility. Initial data shows low citation rates (0% for Vizcom, 4% for competitors), establishing a baseline for future content performance.](https://fathom.video/share/yYqstUyP15G-sWhkKkbTqy9g1v389w55?tab=summary&timestamp=878.0)
  - [**LLM SEO Strategy:** To improve citation rates, content will be structured for LLM readability (FAQ schema, TLDRs, question-based H2s). Vizcom will also optimize its YouTube channel and claim its G2 profile.](https://fathom.video/share/yYqstUyP15G-sWhkKkbTqy9g1v389w55?tab=summary&timestamp=1394.0)

## Topics

### Content OS & Production Kickoff

  - [**Content OS:** The Airtable Content OS is live, containing \~414 blog topics organized by topic cluster.](https://fathom.video/share/yYqstUyP15G-sWhkKkbTqy9g1v389w55?tab=summary&timestamp=133.0)
      - [**"Considering" View (114 topics):** Prioritized list for initial review.](https://fathom.video/share/yYqstUyP15G-sWhkKkbTqy9g1v389w55?tab=summary&timestamp=154.0)
      - [**"Backlog" View (\~300 topics):** Secondary list for future content.](https://fathom.video/share/yYqstUyP15G-sWhkKkbTqy9g1v389w55?tab=summary&timestamp=163.0)
  - [**Approval Process:** Vizcom to approve 10–15 topics across clusters by commenting in Airtable.](https://fathom.video/share/yYqstUyP15G-sWhkKkbTqy9g1v389w55?tab=summary&timestamp=213.0)
  - [**Production Process (Atlas Platform):**](https://fathom.video/share/yYqstUyP15G-sWhkKkbTqy9g1v389w55?tab=summary&timestamp=373.0)
    1.  [**Research:** Atlas uses search APIs (Tavly, Exa) to gather data.](https://fathom.video/share/yYqstUyP15G-sWhkKkbTqy9g1v389w55?tab=summary&timestamp=433.0)
    2.  [**Drafting:** An initial draft is generated.](https://fathom.video/share/yYqstUyP15G-sWhkKkbTqy9g1v389w55?tab=summary&timestamp=503.0)
    3.  [**Human Editing:** Growth X refines the draft to remove "AI mannerisms."](https://fathom.video/share/yYqstUyP15G-sWhkKkbTqy9g1v389w55?tab=summary&timestamp=503.0)
    4.  [**SEO & Fact-Checking:** Atlas adds links, generates meta tags, and fact-checks content.](https://fathom.video/share/yYqstUyP15G-sWhkKkbTqy9g1v389w55?tab=summary&timestamp=520.0)
    5.  [**Final Review:** The completed article is delivered in a Google Doc for Vizcom's feedback.](https://fathom.video/share/yYqstUyP15G-sWhkKkbTqy9g1v389w55?tab=summary&timestamp=703.0)

### Visuals & Brand Alignment

  - [**Requirement:** Vizcom's blog is highly visual and requires inline imagery, not just header images.](https://fathom.video/share/yYqstUyP15G-sWhkKkbTqy9g1v389w55?tab=summary&timestamp=722.0)
  - [**Solution:** Growth X will provide examples of inline visuals (e.g., simple infographics) for review.](https://fathom.video/share/yYqstUyP15G-sWhkKkbTqy9g1v389w55?tab=summary&timestamp=722.0)
  - [**Context:** This aligns with Vizcom's ongoing brand guidelines work, led by Mara.](https://fathom.video/share/yYqstUyP15G-sWhkKkbTqy9g1v389w55?tab=summary&timestamp=722.0)

### LLM Tracking & Strategy (Scrunch)

  - [**Scrunch Dashboard:** Now live, tracking Vizcom's visibility in LLMs (Gemini, Meta, GPT, Perplexity, Claude).](https://fathom.video/share/yYqstUyP15G-sWhkKkbTqy9g1v389w55?tab=summary&timestamp=878.0)
  - [**Initial Data (Baseline):**](https://fathom.video/share/yYqstUyP15G-sWhkKkbTqy9g1v389w55?tab=summary&timestamp=956.0)
      - [**Vizcom Mentions:** Low, but appearing in Google AI Overviews and Gemini.](https://fathom.video/share/yYqstUyP15G-sWhkKkbTqy9g1v389w55?tab=summary&timestamp=1001.0)
      - [**Citation Rate:** 0% for Vizcom, 4% for competitors. This is low for the industry and provides a clear baseline for improvement.](https://fathom.video/share/yYqstUyP15G-sWhkKkbTqy9g1v389w55?tab=summary&timestamp=956.0)
  - [**Key Insight:** Citations are the "new backlinks" for LLMs, driving direct referral traffic. Perplexity and ChatGPT are the top sources of this traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/yYqstUyP15G-sWhkKkbTqy9g1v389w55?tab=summary&timestamp=1163.0)
  - [**LLM SEO Tactics:**](https://fathom.video/share/yYqstUyP15G-sWhkKkbTqy9g1v389w55?tab=summary&timestamp=1394.0)
      - [**Content Structure:** Use FAQ schema, TLDRs, and question-based H2s to make content easily digestible for LLMs.](https://fathom.video/share/yYqstUyP15G-sWhkKkbTqy9g1v389w55?tab=summary&timestamp=1394.0)
      - [**YouTube Optimization:** Optimize titles, descriptions, and transcripts (chapters are key) to improve LLM understanding.](https://fathom.video/share/yYqstUyP15G-sWhkKkbTqy9g1v389w55?tab=summary&timestamp=1649.0)
      - [**Community Engagement:**](https://fathom.video/share/yYqstUyP15G-sWhkKkbTqy9g1v389w55?tab=summary&timestamp=1443.0)
          - [**Reddit:** Vizcom has an authentic origin story on Reddit (CEO Jordan launched it there), creating a natural opportunity for engagement.](https://fathom.video/share/yYqstUyP15G-sWhkKkbTqy9g1v389w55?tab=summary&timestamp=1568.0)
          - [**G2:** Claim and update the G2 profile to improve citation signals.](https://fathom.video/share/yYqstUyP15G-sWhkKkbTqy9g1v389w55?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Vizcom:**](https://fathom.video/share/yYqstUyP15G-sWhkKkbTqy9g1v389w55?tab=summary&timestamp=1780.0)
      - [Approve 10–15 topics in the Airtable "Considering" view.](https://fathom.video/share/yYqstUyP15G-sWhkKkbTqy9g1v389w55?tab=summary&timestamp=213.0)
      - [Share topical ideas in the Growth X Slack channel for keyword analysis.](https://fathom.video/share/yYqstUyP15G-sWhkKkbTqy9g1v389w55?tab=summary&timestamp=1826.0)
      - [Optimize YouTube content (new videos with chapters, audit existing videos).](https://fathom.video/share/yYqstUyP15G-sWhkKkbTqy9g1v389w55?tab=summary&timestamp=1649.0)
      - [Claim and update the G2 profile.](https://fathom.video/share/yYqstUyP15G-sWhkKkbTqy9g1v389w55?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)
  - [**Growth X:**](https://fathom.video/share/yYqstUyP15G-sWhkKkbTqy9g1v389w55?tab=summary&timestamp=1780.0)
      - [Send the initial list of 25 Scrunch prompts for review.](https://fathom.video/share/yYqstUyP15G-sWhkKkbTqy9g1v389w55?tab=summary&timestamp=1070.0)
      - [Provide examples of inline visuals (infographics) for blog posts.](https://fathom.video/share/yYqstUyP15G-sWhkKkbTqy9g1v389w55?tab=summary&timestamp=722.0)
      - [Deliver the first "calibration blog" next week.](https://fathom.video/share/yYqstUyP15G-sWhkKkbTqy9g1v389w55?tab=summary&timestamp=1780.0)
